allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3005" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Not ready yet" })
PowerShell(Get-Job | Stop-Job; Get-Job | Remove-Job; Get-Process node | Where-Object {$_.WorkingSet -gt 40MB} | Select-Object Id, WorkingSet | Format-Table)
